steps: Go to https://www.easypost.com and sign up for a free account
Log in and navigate to your account dashboard
Both a Test API Key and a Production API Key are automatically generated for your account
Copy the Test API Key for development/testing (no charges incurred)
Copy the Production API Key only when ready to go live (real shipments are created and billed)

credential_fields.name: api_key
credential_fields.label: API Key
credential_fields.description: Your EasyPost API key. Use the Test key for development and the Production key for live shipments. Used via HTTP Basic auth with the key as the username.

notes: Free account with no monthly fees — you only pay for postage purchased
Two keys provided: Test (prefix EZTK) for sandbox, Production (prefix EZAK) for live use
Authentication uses HTTP Basic auth with the API key as the username and an empty password
Test mode supports most carrier simulations without purchasing real labels
Rate limits vary by plan; default is generous for most use cases

test_endpoint.description: List addresses in your account to verify credentials
